declared_unit: One bearing unit which consists of one inner ring, one outer ring, rollers, ring, seal, spacer and cage corresponding to 22.73 Kg
note: This EPD follows PCR 2023:03 using modular stages Upstream / Core / Downstream rather than standard EN 15804 A1-A3 modules. The data-quality table labels Upstream+Core as 'A1-A3', so production-stage GWP values were obtained by summing the Upstream and Core columns: GWP-fossil = 116 + 41.3 = 157.3; GWP-total = 113 + 41.3 = 154.3; GWP-biogenic = -3.38 + (-0.012) = -3.392 kg CO2 eq. A separate GWP-GHG indicator is not reported (only the note states electricity grid GWP-GHG = 1.01 kg CO2 eq./kWh). Reported TOTAL (cradle-to-grave incl. downstream): fossil 158, biogenic 0.00, total 158 kg CO2 eq.
